_meta.description: The source documents a BRSR Core reasonable-assurance engagement typically requests, per KPI, grouped by BRSR principle. Illustrative and representative, not exhaustive: the assurer's own evidence request list governs the engagement.
_meta.core_note: Rows flagged 'BRSR Core' correspond to the nine attributes SEBI designated for reasonable assurance in its 12 Jul 2023 circular. Confirm the exact Core attribute list against that circular's annexure for the client's assurance year.

sources.label: ICAI Standards on Assurance Engagements (SSAE 3000, SAE 3410)

rows.evidence: Signed policy documents, board/committee minutes approving them, website URLs
Anti-bribery register, whistle-blower log, disciplinary-action records
Regulator orders, penalty challans, settlement agreements, fines ledger

rows.kpi: Share of related-party transactions in purchases, sales & loans (openness of business)
rows.evidence: RPT register, audited financial statements (RPT note), audit-committee approvals

rows.kpi: R&D and capex on environment- & social-improving products
rows.evidence: Capex/R&D ledger with project tagging, board notes
Procurement policy, supplier sustainability certificates, purchase data
LCA studies, EPR registration & returns, take-back / recycler records

rows.kpi: Spending on employee well-being as % of revenue
rows.evidence: Group-mediclaim policy schedule & premium invoices, staff-welfare ledger, payroll/HRMS well-being extract
Safety incident register, LTIFR working, Form 21 (Factories Act) accident reports, man-hours worked
Insurance roster, policy schedules, coverage %, premium invoices
PF & ESIC challans, gratuity actuarial valuation, maternity/paternity registers
Parental-leave register, return-to-work tracking

rows.kpi: Identified stakeholder groups & mode of engagement
rows.evidence: Stakeholder-engagement plan, consultation minutes, grievance logs
Engagement records, needs-assessment reports

rows.kpi: Wages: minimum-wage & equal-remuneration compliance; % of wages paid to women (gender diversity)
rows.evidence: Payroll registers, minimum-wage registers, gender-wise wage split, equal-remuneration working

rows.kpi: POSH: sexual-harassment complaints filed, disposed & pending
rows.evidence: POSH annual return, IC minutes, complaint register
Grievance-redressal log, remediation records

rows.kpi: GHG emissions Scope 1 & 2 and intensity (GHG footprint)
rows.evidence: Fuel/diesel invoices, DG-set run logs, DISCOM electricity bills, PPA / I-REC certificates, emission-factor working

rows.kpi: Energy consumption & % from renewable sources (energy footprint)
rows.evidence: Energy meter logs, PAT / BEE Form-A, renewable PPAs, solar generation reports

rows.kpi: Water withdrawal, consumption & discharge intensity (water footprint)
rows.evidence: Water meter logs, SPCB consent-to-operate, discharge/effluent monitoring logs, ZLD records
Hazardous-waste manifests (Form 3 / Form 10), recycler receipts, waste-stream registers
Stack-monitoring reports, SPCB consent, ambient-air records

rows.kpi: Trade & industry associations; positions taken on public policy
rows.evidence: List of associations, membership records, advocacy submissions

rows.kpi: Input material sourced from MSMEs / small producers & job creation in smaller towns (inclusive development)
rows.evidence: Vendor master with MSME classification (Udyam), purchase-value split, location-wise hiring data
CSR ledger, Form CSR-2, project reports & impact assessments, board CSR-committee minutes
SIA reports, R&R records where applicable

rows.kpi: Concentration of sales with dealers/trading houses & open consumer complaints (fairness in engaging with customers)
rows.evidence: Sales-concentration working, consumer-complaint register (received / pending), product-recall records
Data-breach register, DPDP-compliance records, incident logs
Label artwork approvals, regulatory-labelling records
